response: Rewrite a business description for a Google My Business profile targeting first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, FL. In 2002, [Name] & The [Team Name] at [Real Estate Company] was founded by [Name] and is an organization that offers Real Estate Agency expertise to both sellers and buyers in commercial and residential properties. The company ([Name] & The [Team Name] at [Real Estate Company]) targets homeowners and business owners, serving as a trusted advisor for all aspects of real estate and financing, with the goal of building long-term relationships. [Name] and his team serve the following locations: Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, Lake Nona Region, Lancaster Park, and other areas in central Florida. The company is operated by a small team of real estate experts.
